personas.role: Product manager responsible for planning, follow-through, and status communication.
goals: Keep stakeholders aligned with minimal manual reporting effort
Spend more time on product judgment and prioritization
pains: Status and action follow-through require manual reconstruction across tools
Operating state becomes stale quickly when updates are fragmented
behavior_notes: Will trust automation only when source state is visibly current
Needs concise drafts that are easy to review and edit
